prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading and hydration optimization

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus snacks for one full day
Emphasizes high carbohydrate content (60-70% of calories) appropriate for endurance training
Includes specific hydration recommendations throughout the day
Provides realistic portion sizes and timing suitable for a marathon runner's training schedule
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring maximum carbohydrate loading and hydration focus

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle gain and strength improvement for weightlifting competition

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3+ meals distributed throughout the day with protein intake optimized around training windows
Total daily protein meets minimum 1.6-2.2g per kg bodyweight (136-187g for this athlete)
Includes specific meal timing recommendations relative to workout for muscle recovery
Plan is compact and presented in a clear, easy-to-follow 1-day format
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein intake and muscle recovery timing throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize energy and recovery for soccer player with two training sessions (morning 9am and evening 6pm)

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals/snacks strategically timed around both training sessions
Meals are compact and concise (brief descriptions, not lengthy recipes)
Appropriate macronutrient balance for soccer athlete energy demands and recovery
All meals respect vegetarian diet and nut-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific scenario (soccer player with two training sessions) requiring energy management and meal timing around practice schedules
